reviews.comment:
Sacando el precio de la nafta, que está por fuera de la decisión de la estación. Cumplen protocolos COVID, podes hacer la compra sin bajarte del auto, a pesar que hay pocos playeros, las colas son ágiles. La estación está limpia y bien señalizada. Para el pago aceptan hasta código QR y si pagas con la App de YPF teto a todos los descuentos: ACA, Club La Nación, etc. Ubicada estrategicamente en una esquina permite que la circulación sea rápida y efectiva. Justo a la salida se encuentra la toma de aire, como para cargar combustible y saliendo cargar aire.

(Translated by Google)
Aside from the price of gasoline, which is not set by the station, they comply with COVID protocols. You can make purchases without leaving your car, and although there are few attendants, the lines move quickly. The station is clean and well-signposted. They accept QR codes for payment, and if you pay with the YPF app, you get all the discounts: ACA, Club La Nación, etc. Strategically located on a corner, it allows for quick and efficient traffic flow. Right outside the station is the air intake, so you can refuel and refill the air pump as you exit.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLXzUyQ1dnEAE

reviews.comment:
Bien temprano me tomé un café y volví al mediodía pensando que me iban a dejar pasar al baño. Me dijeron que la típica alguien lo inundó. Justo venía una señora y la estaban por dejar pasar hasta fueron con la llave para abrirle pero como lo quedé mirando le metió la misma mentira. Realmente necesitaba entrar. Malisimo.

(Translated by Google)
I had a coffee early in the morning and came back at noon thinking they'd let me into the bathroom. They told me that, as usual, someone flooded it. A woman was just coming and they were about to let her in. They even went with the key to open it, but since I was staring, he told her the same lie. He really needed to get in. Terrible.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNLbTREdFhREAE
